page_hint.user_list_desc: Search, create, import/export users. Status badges show activation and lock state; use row actions to edit or lock accounts.
page_hint.tenant_desc: Manage customer workspaces: plan, domain, expiry and status. Active tenants can be edited; inactive ones can be unlocked.
page_hint.plan_desc: Define service packages (code, type, limits). Lock a plan to stop assigning it to new tenants.
page_hint.system_user_desc: Accounts with access to this admin portal. Assign roles and control activation or lock status.
page_hint.role_desc: Browse roles and open permissions mapping for each role code.
page_hint.permission_desc: Catalog of API/menu permissions used when configuring roles.
page_hint.login_history_desc: Audit sign-in attempts: device, location, risk score and success/failure. Filter by date range and channel.
page_hint.lock_history_desc: Track who locked or unlocked accounts and why — useful for security reviews.
